title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 17 2026
summary:
Main
The iron ore market traded sideways today, with the DCE main contract I2609 eventually closing at 762 RMB/ton, up 0.53% from the previous day'sclosing price. Spot prices mostly followed with gains of 0-2 RMB/ton. Traders sold goods in line with market conditions; as the weekend approached, steel mills showed weaker purchasing willingness, and market trading activity was generally moderate.As of July 17, the latest SMM statistics show that iron ore inventory across 35 major ports nationwide totaled 145.13 million tonnes, down 2.03 million tonnes from the previous period, marking another round of destocking.
